title: Nola Turns the Battle Chaotic
description: The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Zoro, Nami. The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You had done well until now.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: A tombstone for the city itself...

summary: The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.
